sections.title: REFERENCES
sections.llm_prompt: Generate a references list for an Equipment Qualification record. Equipment: {product_name} used for {process_type}. Include EQ- SOPs, TM- test methods, calibration procedures, vendor manuals, and GMP standards (21 CFR 211.63, ICH Q7). {description}

sections.title: SCOPE OF QUALIFICATION
sections.llm_prompt: Write the scope of qualification for {product_name} being used in {process_type}. Describe intended use, operating ranges, critical parameters, and whether this is initial, periodic, or post-change requalification.

default_data.text: This record documents qualification activities performed to demonstrate the equipment is suitable for its intended GMP use.

sections.title: Installation Qualification Checklist
sections.llm_prompt: Generate an Installation Qualification checklist for {product_name}. Include nameplate verification, utility connections (power, water, gas, compressed air), documentation package (manuals, drawings, certificates), material of construction certificates, software/firmware version, and environmental conditions.

sections.title: Operational Qualification Checklist
sections.llm_prompt: Generate an Operational Qualification test checklist for {product_name}. Include functional tests (start/stop, range tests, alarm challenges, interlocks), user access controls, data integrity (audit trail, time stamps), and SOP verification.

sections.title: Calibration Verification
sections.llm_prompt: List calibration verification fields for instruments on {product_name}.

default_data.text: Record any discrepancies observed during qualification. Cross-reference deviation record numbers and link to root-cause disposition.

sections.title: CONCLUSION
sections.llm_prompt: Write a conclusion statement for the qualification of {product_name}. State whether acceptance criteria were met and whether the equipment is approved for GMP use.

default_data.text: Based on successful execution of IQ and OQ protocols, the equipment is qualified for its intended use in GMP manufacturing pending Quality Assurance approval.
